title: Nami and Usopp Fight Smart
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Hody Jones, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is nami and usopp fight smart.
scene: The scene follows nami and usopp fight smart, keeping the focus on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Hody Jones, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Then I'll drag all the humans down to the bottom of the sea and make them our slaves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I'm through with them, there won't be a human in the world fool enough to defy the mighty fish-man race!!! And that means pirates, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a look at all these powerful pirates here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is how you're going to end up, straw hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the only one worthy to be called Pirate King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "pirate King" ...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jahahaha hah!! What can a mere ten pirates achieve?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're nothing, don't you get that ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a hundred thousand warriors on my side!!! Take them out...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: ...My new fish-man pirates !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aghah!! That's some serious roaring out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could you guys get out of here?! It's really tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since when are you even interested in the new weapon?! You get out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm hiding in here because it's too scary out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sending you out just yet!! Hang on a minute, yeah?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's ten of us, so I guess that's ten thousand each...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Strength doesn't always come in numbers, you know. They're not even marine elites ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Step Step

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wha -?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aaaaarg Hhhhhh!! What the heck?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is... HAK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has come this far in only two years...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sovereign haki... so he really does have the talent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what I expect from a guy who calls himself my captain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Incredible

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy- Sama...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He didn't even do anything!! They all just collapsed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: H - Hang in there, you guys!! Wake up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammitall!! He took out half our forces in a single instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: f... fifty thousand?! What the heck did he do?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your are body, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna have to beat you up myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if you want to make yourself a King of some island or whatever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But I'm the only one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...who's gonna be pirate King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hahah ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here he comes !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's up with that arm ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care how many men you've got!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AaaAA Arghih H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: time to join the tray, I think.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's see if they get around to surrendering before we wipe 'em all out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let you destroy this mermaid Paradise!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This country concepts an important piece of the world's history...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such passion!! I feel I could start a concert !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: time to reveal the sunny's new weapon! I call it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now I'm getting all excited!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm the ...Pilot ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Soldier Dog"!!!

summary: Nami and Usopp Fight Smart. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
